ats_utilities.pro_config.pro_config module¶

Module

pro_config.py

Info

Defines class ProConfig with attribute(s) and method(s). Defines project configuration container.

class ats_utilities.pro_config.pro_config.ProConfig(checker: IATSChecker | None = None, reporter: IATSReporter | None = None, verbose: bool = False)[source]¶

Bases: IProConfig

Defines class ProConfig with attribute(s) and method(s). Defines project configuration container. Mechanism for project configuration.

It defines:

attributes:
ERRORS - Error checker.
TEMPLATES - Templates key.
MODULES - Modules key.
FORMAT - Format for template file.
__checker - Error checker.
__reporter - ATSReporter for outputting messages.
__verbose - Enable/Disable verbose option.
__config - Tool configuration in dictionary format.
methods:
__init__ - Initials ProConfig constructor.
config - Property methods for set/get operations.
is_config_ok - Checks is project configuration ok.
ERRORS¶

alias of ErrorChecker

FORMAT: str = 'template'¶
MODULES: str = 'modules'¶
TEMPLATES: str = 'templates'¶
__checker: IATSChecker¶
__config: Dict[Any, Any] | None¶
__reporter: IATSReporter¶
__verbose: bool¶
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
property config: Dict[Any, Any] | None¶

Property method for getting project configuration.

Returns:

Formatted project configuration | None

Return type:

<Optional[Dict[Any, Any]]>

Exceptions:

None

is_config_ok() → bool[source]¶

Checks is project configuration ok.

Returns:

True (configuration is not None) | False

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

None
